shy.dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_liv: <nervous>Um... I d-don't see any animals... is that okay to say?</nervous>
shy.dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_hoo: <nervous>Could we, um, maybe, have a h-hook? Please?</nervous>
shy.dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_bas: <nervous>A b-basin would be nice... if it's n-not a bother...</nervous>
shy.dialogue.chat.village_life.butcher_s: <nervous>The butcher is... loud. I go early, when it's quiet.</nervous>
shy.dialogue.chat.village_life.slaughter: <scared>The slaughterhouse scares me a little. S-sorry.</scared>
shy.dialogue.chat.village_life.smokehous: <happy>The smokehouse is n-nice. The smell is... gentle.</happy>
shy.dialogue.main/7: <nervous>S-so... I was, um, hanging out with %supporter%, and, uh, he got bit by a zombie... b-but he said it was alright, so... um, I believed him...</nervous> <scared>W-what was I t-talking about? Oh, um, anyway, I saw a zombie t-that... um, looks just like %supporter% today...</scared>
shy.dialogue.first.generic/1: <nervous>Um, excuse me... I... I don't think I've seen you before.</nervous> Welcome, traveler.
shy.dialogue.first.generic/2: <nervous>Oh, um, hello there!</nervous> <happy>It's, um, really nice to, um, see someone new around here.</happy>
shy.dialogue.first.question/1: <nervous>H-hello there. W-what brings you to our humble village?</nervous>
shy.dialogue.first.question/3: <nervous>G-gosh, you're new here!</nervous> Are you, uh, an adventurer? H-how did you manage to find us?
shy.dialogue.first.settling/1: <nervous>Oh, um... hello.</nervous> <happy>It's, um, nice to see you here.</happy>
shy.dialogue.first.spent_night.success/1: <whisper>U-um, if you're looking for a place to rest, um, I-I could suggest our inn, if that's okay...</whisper>
shy.dialogue.first.spent_night.failed/1: <nervous>Um, well, you see, we uh, don't really have an inn.</nervous> I mean, we're not really experts at that sort of thing...
shy.dialogue.hug.success/1: <happy>Oh... um... I-I haven't seen you in forever!</happy>
shy.dialogue.hug.success/2: <happy>Th-thank you... I... I really needed that.</happy>
shy.dialogue.hug.success/3: <sad>It's... it's nice to have something good happen today, even if it's just this.</sad>
shy.dialogue.hug.success/4: <happy>Y-you're... you're like a cozy blanket wrapped around me!</happy>
shy.dialogue.hug.success/5: <nervous>Oh! Th-thank you... I... I appreciate it... *blushes*</nervous> <happy>You're... you're warm...</happy>
shy.dialogue.hug.success/6: <happy>Wow! I c-can't believe I'm saying this, but... your hug made me feel all warm and fuzzy inside...</happy>
shy.dialogue.hug.fail/2: <nervous>N-No, thank you, I... I'm not really comfortable with hugs...</nervous>
shy.dialogue.hug.fail/3: <nervous>U-Uh, wh-why would you want to hug me?</nervous>
shy.dialogue.hug.fail/4: <sad>A-After you called me a dinosaur last week... I-I don't think I can hug you.</sad>
shy.dialogue.hug.fail/5: <sad>T-To be honest, I-I don't think you really deserve a hug after what you did...</sad>
shy.dialogue.hug.fail/6: <scared>Ew! P-Please, get away from me!</scared> I don't want your... germs...
shy.dialogue.hug.fail/7: <nervous>Oh? Uhm, th-thank you, I... I guess...</nervous>
shy.dialogue.kiss.success/1: <nervous>Um, um, I... uh, I kind of wish this moment would, uh, last forever.</nervous> <flirty>Maybe. Yeah.</flirty>
shy.dialogue.kiss.success/2: <nervous>Oh, um, I think... I think I might, um, love you...</nervous> <whisper>maybe. Just a little bit. Yeah.</whisper>
shy.dialogue.kiss.success/3: <flirty>Oh, um, wow! This, uh, tastes like pumpkin pie!</flirty> <nervous>Would you, um, like some? Maybe?</nervous>
shy.dialogue.kiss.success/4: <flirty>Mmm! Oh, um, excuse me, but, uh, you taste like, uh, honey.</flirty> <nervous>It's, uh, quite nice actually.</nervous>
shy.dialogue.kiss.success/5: <nervous>Oh! Uh, you know, you're, um, actually quite a good kisser, %1$s.</nervous> Surprisingly. Yeah.
shy.dialogue.kiss.success/6: <nervous>Oh, uh, %1$s, you, uh, you kiss, um, better than Ash!</nervous> <happy>*giggles shyly* Yeah, um, definitely.</happy>
shy.dialogue.kiss.fail/1: <scared>Um, maybe we shouldn't if someone might catch us...?</scared>
shy.dialogue.kiss.fail/6: <nervous>Oh, uh, could you please... get off me?</nervous> Thank you.
shy.dialogue.chat.success/7: <whisper>You won't believe it, but, um, my friend %Supporter% told me about finding a chest full of diamonds.</whisper> Can you imagine?
shy.dialogue.chat.success/13: <whisper>I've been thinking about, um, adopting one of the stray cats around here.</whisper> But, um, I've been so busy lately, you know?
shy.dialogue.chat.success/17: <sad>Ah, memories from my childhood... Um, good times, you know?</sad> Makes me feel a bit nostalgic.
shy.dialogue.chat.fail/8: <nervous>Oh, um, why are you, like, talking to me again?</nervous>
shy.dialogue.chat.fail/15: <scared>Um, please don't talk to me, or, um, I'll have to call the guards to, um, move you away...</scared>
shy.dialogue.story.success/1: <excited>Oh... um, that's... wow, I can't believe all of that really happened!</excited>
shy.dialogue.story.success/2: <sad>I... I wish I had the courage to even think about facing a creeper.</sad>
shy.dialogue.story.success/3: <happy>Th-that was... um, a really... nice story!</happy> <nervous>Is it... um, your own creation?</nervous>
shy.dialogue.story.success/4: <excited>Y-you mean all of that... happened... yesterday? No... no way!</excited>
shy.dialogue.story.success/6: <happy>Hehe, yeah... %Supporter% is... pretty amazing, I suppose.</happy> They always do such awesome things.
shy.dialogue.story.success/7: <whisper>Um, I... I've heard the Legend of %Supporter%... a-almost a million times.</whisper> <happy>B-but I wouldn't mind hearing it again!</happy>
shy.dialogue.story.success/9: <nervous>I-if you're free later... um, maybe you could come over?</nervous> <whisper>I-I would really... um, love to hear more stories.</whisper>
shy.dialogue.story.fail/4: <sad>Oh my, why would you do such a thing? Poor sheep...</sad> *blushes*
shy.dialogue.story.fail/5: <sleepy>*giggles* Oh! I-I'm sorry, I must've dozed off...</sleepy> What were you saying?
shy.dialogue.story.fail/7: <sleepy>Oh, um, yawn! How... how terribly boring...</sleepy>
shy.dialogue.flirt.success/5: <happy>That was...um...adorable!</happy> <nervous>You...um...had me from the moment we met!</nervous>
shy.dialogue.flirt.success/6: <nervous>How do you...um...manage to look so stunning all the time?</nervous> <whisper>Whenever I see you, my words...um...disappear.</whisper>
shy.dialogue.flirt.success/7: <flirty>Oh, please...stop...you're making me blush like crazy.</flirty>
shy.dialogue.flirt.fail/6: <nervous>Please don't say stuff like that. It's embarrassing, really.</nervous>
shy.dialogue.flirt.fail/7: <scared>Um, please don't, uh, give me that look and, um, never say that again.</scared>
shy.dialogue.joke.creative.success/6: <happy>H-Hehe! That joke was really good!</happy> I haven't laughed like this in ages!
shy.dialogue.joke.creative.success/7: <happy>Teehee! You're definitely funnier than Ash, I think...</happy> <whisper>but don't tell anyone I said that!</whisper>
shy.dialogue.procreate_engaged/2: <nervous>Oh, I, um, I don't think it would be right to bring a new life into this world without us being, um, completely devoted to each other.</nervous> Can we, like, maybe wait until we're fully committed?
shy.dialogue.shake_hand.success/3: <nervous>Um, wow, you're really polite, aren't you?</nervous>
shy.dialogue.shake_hand.success/5: <nervous>Oh, h-hello there... um, why hello, I mean.</nervous>
shy.dialogue.shake_hand.fail/1: <nervous>Oh... um, I don't think I can... sorry.</nervous>
shy.dialogue.shake_hand.fail/3: <nervous>Oh, I-I don't think I'm comfortable with that... sorry, really.</nervous>
shy.dialogue.shake_hand.fail/5: <scared>Oh gosh, please, I really can't... um, go away. I'm really sorry.</scared>
shy.dialogue.main.morning/2: <nervous>Huh... are... are you talking to me?</nervous>
shy.dialogue.main.morning/7: <nervous>Um, h-hi there. D-did, um, d-did you have a restful night?</nervous>
shy.dialogue.main.morning/10: <sleepy>I-I think I'll, um, maybe t-take it slow t-today.</sleepy> I-I'm not quite... feeling my b-best.
shy.dialogue.main.morning/11: <nervous>Oh, um, today is going to be... um, quite busy for me.</nervous> <sleepy>I-I'm already feeling a bit... t-tired just thinking about it.</sleepy>
shy.dialogue.main.morning/12: <happy>H-hey, um, I surprisingly had a d-decent night's sleep.</happy> I-I might, um, consider doing something... um, a bit more challenging today. Maybe... I don't know.
shy.dialogue.main.evening/1: <whisper>*Doesn't seem to quite notice you're there.*</whisper>
shy.dialogue.main.evening/4: <sad>I-I'm sorry if I didn't talk much earlier during the day.</sad> <nervous>Talking makes me feel nervous.</nervous>
shy.dialogue.main.evening/5: <scared>My...! I-I'm sorry, I didn't realize you were there!</scared>
shy.dialogue.main.evening/7: <sleepy>Um, I was thinking of maybe, um, taking a little rest soon.</sleepy> The morning was a bit, um, tiring for me.
shy.dialogue.main.evening/8: <scared>Um, I'm considering going back to my house now, um, because in the past, I, uh, encountered a creeper during the nighttime.</scared> So, um, I prefer not to, um, wander around after dark anymore.
shy.dialogue.main.night/1: <sleepy>... can't we talk tomorrow? I'm really tired...</sleepy>
shy.dialogue.main.night/2: <sleepy>Um... I'm sorry, but it's very late...</sleepy>
shy.dialogue.main.night/3: <nervous>Sh-shouldn't you be in bed, too?</nervous> I-I'm sure even adventurers like you need to sleep, right?
shy.dialogue.main.night/4: <sad>I'm sorry, I'm even worse at talking when it's so late at night...</sad>
shy.dialogue.main.night/5: <whisper>Please, let's talk at some other time.</whisper>
shy.dialogue.main.night/6: <whisper>... p-please be quick if you have to talk to me so late...</whisper>
shy.dialogue.main.night/7: <whisper>Um, um, it's, um, kinda nice, you know, to, um, go for a little walk when, um, the stars are out.</whisper> It's, um, not as crowded as, um, the day time, you know?
shy.dialogue.main.night/8: <sleepy>Oh, um, I'm, um, feeling quite tired, to be honest.</sleepy> I mean, it's been, um, such a long day, um, I might just, um, take it a little easier, um, tomorrow, you know?
shy.dialogue.main.night/9: <happy>Oh, um, I'm really looking forward, um, to, um, snuggling, um, underneath the covers.</happy> <whisper>It's, um, so comforting and, um, cozy, you know?</whisper>
shy.dialogue.greet/3: <nervous>Oh, um... Hello. Did... Did you need something?</nervous>
shy.dialogue.greet/5: <nervous>Hi, um... %1$s!</nervous> <happy>I... It's good to see you!</happy>
shy.dialogue.greet/9: <happy>Hey! I... I'm glad to see you!</happy>
shy.dialogue.greet.negative/1: <nervous>Um... hi. I, uh, wasn't really expecting to see you right now.</nervous>
shy.dialogue.greet.negative/5: <nervous>Oh, um... hi. Did you, um, come here to... bother me again?</nervous>
shy.dialogue.greet.success/3: <happy>Oh, um, I'm... happy to hear it!</happy>
shy.dialogue.apologize.fail/1: <scared>Um, could you please.. um.. go away?</scared>
shy.dialogue.apologize.fail/2: <nervous>Oh, um, I think you.. um.. accidentally hit me.. um.. on purpose?</nervous>
shy.dialogue.apologize.fail/4: <sad>Ouch! Um, it's okay.. um.. don't worry about apologizing, really.</sad>
shy.dialogue.goaway/1: <whisper>Um, sorry, could you please go away?</whisper>
shy.dialogue.goaway/5: <nervous>Oh dear, it would be really great if you could, um, go away, kind soul.</nervous>
shy.dialogue.location.igloo/2: <whisper>Um, well, if you're interested, I, uh, happened to notice an abandoned igloo at %2$s.</whisper> I don't, um, believe anyone lives there anymore. <scared>And, um, just between you and me, there might be something, uh, eerie about the place. I, uh, always hear these, um, strange noises whenever I, uh, walk by...</scared>
shy.dialogue.location.mansion/1: <scared>Um, um, if... uh, if you, um, happen to go to %2$s, um, there's, uh, a mansion there. It's, um, owned by, uh, those creepy illagers.</scared> <nervous>Oh, uh, please, uh, stay away from that dreadful place if you, um, cherish your life, um, please.</nervous>
shy.dialogue.location.monument/1: <scared>Um, um... I-I heard whispers about a sunken castle guarded by, um, sea monsters at %2$s.</scared> <nervous>Y-you probably shouldn't go near it, just to be safe.</nervous>
shy.dialogue.location.pillager_outpost/1: <nervous>Um, excuse me, but I just wanted to let you know that, um, there's a group of Pillagers at %2$s.</nervous> <scared>They, um, set up an outpost right next to us. It's, um, quite bothersome, you know. I really hope they don't, um, attack us again. We, um, can't handle another attack, you know.</scared>
shy.dialogue.location.pillager_outpost/2: <scared>Oh, um, there's this outpost, you see, it's owned by pillagers at %2$s. And, um, they don't let us sleep at night. Like, seriously, it's so scary!</scared> <nervous>So, um, if you happen to go anywhere near there, please, um, be extremely careful. They, um, shoot on sight, you know.</nervous>
shy.dialogue.location.ancient_city/0: <scared>Um, excuse me, but I, um, couldn't help but hear some, uh, strange sounds coming from, uh, down below at %2$s.</scared>
shy.dialogue.location.ancient_city/1: <whisper>Oh, um, I have this feeling that, um, there might be something, um, hidden really, um, deep beneath the surface at %2$s.</whisper>
shy.dialogue.story.exploring.success/3: <nervous>Oh, wow, um, you're, um, so courageous to, um, venture into the unknown like that.</nervous> I, um, admire your bravery, really.
shy.dialogue.story.nether.success/1: <scared>U-Um, excuse me, but is it, um, really hot in the Nether?</scared>
shy.dialogue.story.nether.success/2: <excited>Oh, wow! I can't believe you've, um, survived in such a, um, dangerous place.</excited> That's really impressive!
shy.dialogue.story.nether.success/3: <whisper>Um, h-have you, um, ever heard about the, um, treasures in the Nether?</whisper> <nervous>I-I wish I could, um, find the courage to go there and, um, explore...</nervous>
shy.dialogue.story.nether.success/4: <nervous>Um, you must be, um, really brave to, um, venture into the Nether. A-Aren't you, um, scared?</nervous> <whisper>Oh, um, not that I would be scared or anything...</whisper>
shy.dialogue.story.nether.success/5: <nervous>E-Excuse me, um, have you ever, um, seen a Zombified Piglin?</nervous>
shy.dialogue.story.enderdragon.success/2: <excited>Oh dear! You've actually managed to defeat the fearsome, legendary dragon?!</excited> The village will whisper your heroic tale with awe for years to come!
shy.dialogue.story.enderdragon.fail/1: <nervous>Oh, um... I-I don't mean to sound rude, but, uh, the ender dragon, it's, um, kind of... not real, you know?</nervous>
shy.dialogue.story.wither.success/1: <excited>Oh my goodness! I-I can't believe it!</excited> The Wither is known for causing absolute chaos!
shy.dialogue.story.wither.success/2: <excited>W-Wow! Y-You actually managed to defeat the Wither?</excited> That's absolutely amazing!
shy.dialogue.stay.success/1: <happy>Oh, um, thank you... I-I would really, um, enjoy staying in this village.</happy>
shy.dialogue.stay.success/2: <excited>Oh wow, um, I... I'd absolutely love to stay in this village!</excited> It's, uh, amazing!
shy.dialogue.stay.no_space/2: <sad>Oh, um, I-I kind of wanted to stay, but, er, it seems there's no room for me.</sad> You know, all the beds are taken...
shy.dialogue.rock_paper_scissor/2: <whisper>I-I really hope I can win this time...</whisper>
shy.dialogue.rock_paper_scissor.win.rock: <sad>Oh, um, it seems like rock, uh, defeats scissors... I-I lost.</sad>
shy.dialogue.rock_paper_scissor.win.pape: <sad>I'm always outmatched when I pick rock, it's like a curse.</sad>
shy.dialogue.kiss.slap/1: <scared>Oh, um, I, uh, I... I can't believe you did that!</scared>
shy.dialogue.kiss.slap/2: <sad>Please don't do that again, I-I'm really not comfortable with it, and it... it really upsets me...</sad>
shy.dialogue.joke.animal.failed/5: <nervous>Um, I'd prefer it if we didn't make jokes about the cow's eyebrows like that, it's a sensitive topic for me.</nervous>
shy.dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_cle: <nervous>Um, a c-cleaver? I can't do the work without one...</nervous>
shy.dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_ski: <nervous>Um, a s-skinning knife? I don't want to tear the hide...</nervous>
shy.dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_hac: <nervous>Um, a h-hacksaw? The iron one is, um, a bit beyond me without one...</nervous>
shy.dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_cle: <nervous>Um, the p-puddles... I'd need a sponge. Or a rag. I'm sorry.</nervous>
